selected3.name: Cursor AI Mobile - Remote IDE
selected3.prd:
# PRD — Cursor AI Mobile - Remote IDE

## Problem
Developers often need to check logs, run quick commands, and respond to incidents while away from laptop. Existing mobile tools are slow and context-poor.

## Target User
- Indie founders
- On-call developers
- Small engineering teams

## MVP Scope
1. Secure host connection list
2. Quick command panel (restart, health checks, logs tail)
3. Session output viewer
4. Push notification on command completion
5. Basic audit history

## Success Metrics
- Day-7 retention > 20%
- 3+ sessions per active user/week
- Trial-to-paid conversion > 4%

## Monetization
- Free: 1 host + basic commands
- Pro monthly: multiple hosts, saved workflows, alerts

## Risks
- Security trust concerns
- Strong incumbents in dev tooling

selected3.name: Clouder for Cloudflare
selected3.prd:
# PRD — Clouder for Cloudflare

## Problem
Cloudflare users need quick infra actions on mobile (DNS fix, cache purge, worker status), but desktop-first dashboards are heavy on phone.

## Target User
- Solo builders managing infra
- Small agencies
- DevOps-minded teams

## MVP Scope
1. Zone list and health status
2. DNS read/write
3. Cache purge one-tap
4. Worker and Pages deployment status
5. Event log and alert feed

## Success Metrics
- Weekly active rate > 30%
- Core action completion < 20 sec median
- Paid conversion > 3%

## Monetization
- Free: read-only + limited actions
- Pro: full write operations, multi-account, alerts

## Risks
- API dependency changes
- Brand/trademark compliance pressure

selected3.name: Tornado Tracker by TornadoPath
selected3.prd:
# PRD — Tornado Tracker by TornadoPath

## Problem
People in high-risk weather regions need faster, clearer warning signals than generic weather apps provide.

## Target User
- Families in tornado-prone states
- Storm chasers
- Local emergency volunteers

## MVP Scope
1. Real-time warning map
2. Saved locations + alert radius
3. Push + SMS escalation
4. Risk timeline (next 6h)
5. Safety checklist mode

## Success Metrics
- Alert open rate > 35%
- 7-day retention > 25% during active weather periods
- Premium conversion > 2.5%

## Monetization
- Free: map + basic alerts
- Premium: advanced layers, family sharing, SMS fallback

## Risks
- False alert perception can hurt trust
- Seasonality causes uneven usage
